content_body: From someone who is extremely picky about where we stay, this cabin far exceeded our expectations. I was overwhelmed by the beauty of it coming in, and we are all sad leaving going out. We are already talking about our next visit to Cohutta Sunset. We made beautiful memories here and appreciate all the details, from the gorgeous kitchen with the tin roof stove vent to the waterfall shower, to the industrial TP holders. :) Thank you for accommodating our family's special requirements. We were able to relax and enjoy our visit here. Our only regret is that we couldn't stay longer.
title: Far Exceeded Our Expectations
